ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "open_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the market data period began */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of cryptocurrency traded during the period */,
  "close_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the market data period ended */,
  "quote_volume" REAL /* Total quote volume for the period */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "taker_base_volume" REAL /* Volume of the base asset traded by the taker */,
  "taker_quote_volume" REAL /* Volume of the quote asset traded by the taker */,
  "ignore" INTEGER /* Field to ignore */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp in UTC format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_time", "crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the cryptocurrency is active or not */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Current circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, data analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the user account is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for 2FA */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's physical address for compliance and verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the trade occurred */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of the trade */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for the chart */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval for the chart (e.g., 1min, 5min, 1hour) */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the chart period began */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the chart period ended */,
  "data_points" TEXT /* Array of data points for the chart */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the chart data is from */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, candlestick, bar) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the chart data */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the chart data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert should trigger */,
  "alert_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, trend) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the alert is active, triggered, or dismissed */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel used to notify the user (e.g., email, SMS, app notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for the indicator */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value of the indicator */,
  "calculation_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the indicator was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used in the calculation of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for the prediction */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used for the prediction */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted market trend */,
  "prediction_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_period" TEXT /* Period for which the prediction is made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the activity */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the trading activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the activity is compliant or not */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., trade, withdrawal) */,
  "activity_value" REAL /* Value associated with the activity (e.g., trade amount) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for the recommendation */,
  "advice" TEXT /* Trading advice given */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level in the advice */,
  "recommendation_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the recommendation was given */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for which the recommendation is valid */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user in response to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency accessed */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
